name: Okta: Privileged Users with Non-Active Status
description: Finds privileged users with role assignments whose status is not ACTIVE, including deactivated, suspended, or provisioning-incomplete accounts.
query:
MATCH p = (u:Okta_User)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment|Okta_MemberOf*1..2]->(r:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE u.status <> "ACTIVE"
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
